· • —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– • ·

“The Other Man”

You were in an abusive relationship. And you wanted out.

And so, in an attempt to rebel against your relationship, you went to a nightclub against your boyfriend's will. And in this fateful day, you met him.

At first, it was all casual.

That was until he became your solace, and you became his constant.

“You took out all of your pain on me, so now left with nothing but your pain.”
